query: SELECT id, entityName, SUBSTRING(fundingPurpose, 1, 500) as fundingPurpose_preview FROM business_plans;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute SELECT id, entityName, SUBSTRING(fundingPurpose, 1, 500) as fundingPurpose_preview FROM business_plans;

rows.fundingPurpose_preview: Real-Eye-Nation LLC requires funding to expand our media production and content creation capabilities that serve community education and cultural preservation. Our platform produces educational content, documentary films, and digital media that amplify underrepresented voices and preserve ancestral knowledge. Investment will enable us to upgrade production equipment, hire additional creative staff, expand distribution channels, and develop interactive educational content that reaches broader aud

The Calea Freeman Family Trust requires funding to establish and manage family assets that support multi-generational wealth building and legacy preservation. LuvOnPurpose Autonomous Wealth System LLC requires funding to develop and deploy our comprehensive financial automation platform that serves families and small businesses in building autonomous wealth. Our system integrates financial tracking, automated savings, investment management, and wealth preservation tools designed specifically for underserved communities. Investment will enable us to enhance platform security, add advanced analytics features, expand user capacity, and develop educationa

The L.A.W.S. Collective urgently needs funding to scale our technology-enabled workforce transition program. Our SaaS platform provides essential tools for transforming W-2 employees into independent business owners, but we require investment to expand platform development, enhance AI-powered business planning features, grow our contractor training program capacity, and extend community outreach to underserved populations. This funding will directly enable us to serve 100+ additional contractors

rows.entityName: LuvOnPurpose Outreach Temple and Academy Society, Inc.
rows.fundingPurpose_preview: LuvOnPurpose Academy requires funding to establish and expand our sovereign education program that serves families seeking faith-based, culturally-rooted learning alternatives. Our K-12 curriculum integrates ancestral wisdom with modern academic standards, but we need resources to develop additional Divine STEM modules, expand our language programs, train qualified educators, and establish physical learning spaces. This investment will enable us to enroll 200+ students in our first three years,
